gold.rationale: 样本文本把社交平台上的传言、情绪化评论与二手拼接素材包装成“以色列已公开宣布并持续打击伊朗、卫星快速评估设施受损、伊朗报复倒计时”的近实时事实叙事，但关键“证据图”包含明确的生成/编辑产物，且与文本在武器类型、事件归属、时间地点与证据强度上多重不一致，导致受众获得的主要结论（已发生并被官方确认的大规模袭击及其证据闭环）不成立。尤其是封面“拦截画面”、残骸“图解”、以及“卫星对比评估图”均为生成内容或带强引导性标注，无法作为发生在伊朗、发生在所述时段、由以色列实施的打击之直接证明；与此同时，文本又用“以色列公开表示已对伊朗发动先发制人打击”“IDF称仍在继续打击伊朗境内目标”“所谓卫星公司快速更新”等确定性措辞推进结论，形成明显的‘强结论—弱证据’错配。样本还通过分钟级时间线、航班轨迹与市场波动的并置，制造“多源交叉验证”的观感，但这些要素本身并未提供可追溯来源与可核验链路，反而强化了把不相干或无法证实的素材绑定到同一夜同一事件的语境错置。基于以上，整体核心叙事属于以虚构/错置语境叠加合成视觉与跨模态不一致来误导公众，应判定为 False。

atoms: Image shows a night view of a city skyline with illuminated buildings.
Multiple bright streaks of light (missile trails) are visible in the sky.
Two large explosions or interceptions are visible in the upper sky.
A digital timestamp overlay in the top left reads 'MAR 01 2026 01:12'.
A watermark in the bottom right corner reads 'REGIONAL SOURCE'.
Image shows a large, burnt cylindrical metal object lying on dry ground.
The object is broken, revealing internal wiring and structure.
Red arrows point to specific parts of the debris.
Text overlay 'Separation marks' points to the broken edge.
Text overlay 'Booster stage (air-launched ballistic ballistic missile)' points to the main body.
Bottom left text reads 'IRAN / Mar 1, 2026 (unverified)'.
Image shows a cylindrical metal object with fins lying on a grassy hill.
The object appears to be a missile or rocket casing.
A large semi-transparent watermark 'NEWS' is overlaid across the center.
The background shows a dirt path and green vegetation.
Image is a split-screen satellite comparison labeled 'Rapid Satellite Assessment'.
Top image labeled 'PRE-INCIDENT: 2026-03-01 / 10:30 UTC' shows an industrial facility.
Bottom image labeled 'POST-INCIDENT: 2026-03-01 / 14:15 UTC' shows the same facility with smoke and damage.
A red box highlights a damaged area in the post-incident image.
Text identifies the location as 'NATANZ AREA, IRAN (UNCONFIRMED)'.
Image is a screenshot of a flight booking app interface.
A pop-up chart is visible with the title '避险资产走高 (市场盘中)' (Safe-haven assets rising).
The chart shows two lines labeled 'Gold' and 'Brent Crude' trending upwards.
Background text shows flight routes including '大马士革' (Damascus) and '上海' (Shanghai).
Dates visible include '02-28' and '03-01'.
Image shows a scene of heavy destruction with collapsed concrete buildings.
A yellow bulldozer is operating amidst the rubble.
Several people are standing around observing the scene.
Dust and debris are visible in the air and on the ground.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A night surveillance-style photo showing a city skyline with multiple missile trails and explosions in the sky. A digital timestamp 'MAR 01 2026 01:12' is in the top left, and 'REGIONAL SOURCE' is in the bottom right.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows missile interceptions at night, matching the post's description of 'night sky flashes' and 'interception footage'.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A photo of burnt missile debris on the ground with red arrows and English text annotations identifying 'Separation marks' and 'Booster stage (air-launched ballistic ballistic missile)'. A caption at the bottom reads 'IRAN / Mar 1, 2026 (unverified)'.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: Separation marks | Booster stage (air-launched ballistic ballistic missile) | IRAN / Mar 1, 2026 (unverified)
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image provides visual evidence of missile debris, aligning with the post's discussion of 'booster stage wreckage'.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A photo of a missile casing with fins lying on a grassy slope. A large 'NEWS' watermark is superimposed over the center of the image.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows missile wreckage, consistent with the post's theme of 'suspected wreckage landing'.

visual_indicators.scene_description: An infographic comparing satellite imagery of the 'NATANZ AREA, IRAN' before and after an incident on March 1, 2026. The post-incident image shows smoke and damage highlighted by a red box.

visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image matches the post's description of 'satellite comparison maps' showing damage to nuclear facilities.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A screenshot of a mobile app showing flight tickets and a pop-up chart titled '避险资产走高 (市场盘中)' (Safe-haven assets rising). The chart tracks 'Gold' and 'Brent Crude' prices.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 避险资产走高 (市场盘中) | Gold | Brent Crude | 大马士革 | 上海 | 02-28 | 03-01
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image illustrates the market impact mentioned in the post, specifically regarding safe-haven assets and flight routes.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A photo of a destroyed urban area with collapsed buildings and a yellow bulldozer clearing rubble. People are standing nearby observing the destruction.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image depicts the aftermath of an attack, consistent with the post's general theme of conflict and destruction.

cross_modal: image_1 is presented as visual evidence of the 'night sky explosions' and interception events occurring on the night of Feb 28 to Mar 1, 2026.
image_2 is used to support the claim of 'booster stage debris' falling, featuring annotations identifying 'separation marks' and 'air-launched ballistic missile' parts.
image_3 is offered as additional photographic evidence of 'suspected debris' (a missile casing) found on the ground.
image_4 is presented as a 'satellite comparison chart' showing 'pre-incident' and 'post-incident' damage to the Natanz area in Iran on Mar 1, 2026.
image_5 is used to illustrate the 'market volatility' and 'flight disruption' claims, showing a chart of rising Gold and Brent Crude prices alongside flight booking data.
image_6 is used to depict the 'destruction' and aftermath of the conflict, showing a bulldozer clearing rubble in a damaged urban area.

retrieved_evidence.text: 围绕以色列2月28日晚对伊朗多点空袭，社交平台上流传的第一波爆炸和防空火光描述成为舆论焦点。根据区域消息来源的说法，伊斯法罕、纳坦兹附近以及西部部分军工设施上空接连出现剧烈爆闪与高空火球，伴随明显的防空拦截轨迹与地面高射火力。多名观察者提到，爆炸时间集中在当地深夜数分钟内，显示出一次经过精心编排的联合作战打击，目标直指伊朗核计划与导弹力量节点。
有关纳坦兹（Natanz）浓缩铀设施区域的最新研判中，商业卫星与防务分析机构特别关注袭击前后地表变化。纳坦兹周边本为荒漠与工业设施混合地带，空袭后被报道出现数个规则弹坑与黑色烟渍，位置接近疑似地下工程出入口与辅助建筑。分析人士指出，这种地表灼烧和爆炸痕迹常被用来评估关键核设施是否遭受穿透性打击，并据此推测以色列对伊朗核基础设施实施“定点削弱”的作战意图。
以色列在2026年2月28日晚宣布并实施对伊朗境内多点空袭后，伊朗多座大城市上空被报道出现多处火光与防空导弹拦截轨迹，夜空中交错的弹道与爆炸光团被形容为新一轮地区军事升级的标志。据相关人员介绍，德黑兰及中部工业区在当夜进入高度戒备状态，防空部队集中拦截疑似巡航导弹与空射弹道导弹，局部电力与通信一度受影响，凸显地区局势逼近全面战争边缘。
在空袭行动细节流传的描述中，有关疑似导弹助推器残骸的内容引发军事圈关注。据称，伊朗中部地区发现的金属圆筒和分段结构被一些观察者标注为“空射弹道导弹助推器分离段”，表现出多级推进器抛弃后的典型特征。相关报道指出，这类残骸通常用于分析导弹型号和飞行轨迹，帮助研判以色列此次打击伊朗关键核设施与军工基地时采用的武器系统与飞行路线。
在以色列空袭伊朗本土、地区紧张升至全面战争边缘的背景下，全球大宗商品市场避险情绪显著升温。近期交易日中，国际原油与黄金价格被报道出现快速拉升，投资者加大对传统避险资产的配置，以对冲中东航道受阻、能源供应中断及地缘风险扩散的可能性。据财经机构分析，这种对“冲突升级”的预期与以色列打击伊朗关键核设施和军工基地的消息高度同步，反映市场对地区安全格局长期不确定性的担忧。

#以色列宣布袭击伊朗# #美伊以冲突# 
这次以色列照例使用大量空射弹道导弹袭击伊朗，掉落的助推器清晰可见。当今世界实战运用空射弹道导弹经验最丰富的就是俄罗斯空天军和以色列空军了。
#热点观点# ​​​
#伊朗正准备毁灭性报复行动#伊朗还是嘴炮太多了，确实一直没能拿出有威慑性的反击显得很被动，确实需要实质性的回应了！#以色列宣布袭击伊朗# ​​​
多名军事领域研究人员近日在接受采访时表示，空射武器、弹道导弹以及相关助推器残骸等概念，在现代战争与武器发展史中确有广泛应用。公开资料显示，此类武器系统常被各国用于远程打击、战略威慑或防御部署，相关残片有时会出现在冲突区域周边并被媒体提及。专家指出，相关技术细节往往较为复杂，外界在解读此类术语及其现场图像时，通常需要结合权威渠道信息和专业分析，避免过度引申或简单化理解。

#以色列宣布袭击伊朗#
买命钱变得具象化…… ​​​
据多地网络观察机构近日通报，部分主流社交平台上出现话题标签“#以色列宣布袭击伊朗#”，在短时间内吸引大量用户围绕中东局势发表评论。据悉，参与讨论的既有普通网民，也包括若干拥有认证标识的账户，这些账户多以转述报道、转发短视频或发表评论为主。相关人士指出，平台内关于该话题的信息来源和判断依据并不一致，讨论内容呈现多元化特征，部分细节尚有待各方进一步核实与跟进说明。
多家金融机构人士近日表示，国际市场对中东局势变化一向较为敏感，当出现有关冲突升级的消息时，黄金、原油以及航运保险等相关领域的价格与风险偏好可能出现一定波动。据称，部分交易机构会在类似时期提高对区域政治新闻的关注度，以调整仓位和风险管理策略。分析人士同时强调，市场反应受多重因素影响，短期情绪与中长期基本面往往交织作用，具体表现仍需观察后续发展及主要经济体政策信号。
区域与国际社会对以色列空袭伊朗本土的反应呈现高度分化。部分西方国家在公开表述中对伊朗核计划长期不透明表示关切，但同时呼吁避免局势升级为全面战争；另一些国家则强调尊重伊朗主权，批评未经联合国授权的单边军事行动。近期多边外交场合中，联合国安理会被要求紧急磋商，以色列在2026年2月28日晚实施的空袭是否违反国际法，以及如何通过外交渠道防止红海、波斯湾等重要航道安全局势进一步恶化。
在军事层面，以色列对伊朗多点空袭被认为高度依赖空中加油机、隐身战机与远程精确制导武器的综合运用。防务专家推测，打击过程中可能使用从战斗机发射的远程空地导弹与空射弹道导弹，以穿透伊朗纵深防空网络并攻击地下核设施与军工基地。根据近期安全领域报道，区域雷达监控曾捕捉到高空航迹和不明飞行目标，印证双方在侦察预警与远程打击能力上的博弈日趋白热化。
伊朗方面在空袭后迅速启动国家危机指挥机制，最高国家安全委员会密集召开会议，讨论对以色列及其盟友的应对选项。关心内政的观察人士注意到，国内媒体在报道中强调“抵抗轴心”的统一战线，提及黎巴嫩真主党、伊拉克什叶派武装等盟友可能在不同战线采取行动。此类表述被视为向以色列与周边国家释出的信号，表明伊朗将空袭视为对其主权与核计划的重大挑战，准备在地区层面展开更广泛的反制。
区域问题观察人士近日梳理双方公开表态称，在涉及突发安全事件或地区紧张局势时，伊朗方面一贯强调保留作出回应的权利，常通过外交和媒体渠道表示将根据情况采取相应措施。与此同时，以色列官员在历史多次表态中则反复强调其自卫立场，指出来自周边的安全威胁是其政策考量的重要因素。分析认为，这一叙事框架使得相关言行多被包装在“回应”“自卫”“威胁评估”等概念之下，为外界理解双方立场提供了基本参照。
伊朗境内多点空袭发生后，德黑兰及多座大城市的防空洞、地下停车场与地铁站在当夜被大量民众用作临时避难空间。关心局势的居民根据官方公告和警报系统，携带简易行李与食物在地下停留数小时，以应对可能持续的空袭与报复性打击。有分析指出，这种民防体系的启用显示伊朗当局已将以色列袭击视作高烈度冲突情形，准备在区域局势继续升级时维持基本城市运转与人员安全。
以色列国内在宣布打击伊朗本土核设施与军工基地后，政府高层通过电视讲话与议会质询试图巩固国内共识。安全内阁成员强调，此次行动旨在防止伊朗在未来数年内获得可部署的核武能力，并称这是保障以色列及地区长期安全的“预防性打击”。然而，在野党与部分社会团体则对可能引发全面战争的风险表达担忧，要求政府明确交代行动的法律依据、国际协调情况以及对平民伤亡的评估。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post presents specific military actions (preemptive strikes, debris, satellite damage) as factual events occurring on specific dates, while the evidence only confirms the existence of social media rumors and general market sensitivity without corroborating the actual military event.
text_analysis.t1_evidence: The post claims 'Israel publicly stated it launched a preemptive strike against Iran' and describes specific debris and satellite damage, but evidence [5] only confirms the hashtag trend and notes that 'details remain to be verified', and evidence [7] only discusses general historical rhetoric, providing no corroboration for the specific strike event.
t1_problematic_subclaims: Israel publicly stated it launched a preemptive strike against Iran
Satellite comparison chart showing damage to Natanz area on Mar 1, 2026
Booster stage debris found on the ground
text_analysis.t2_evidence: The post frames the situation as a confirmed 'preemptive strike' with 'continuous strikes' and 'destruction', whereas evidence [5] describes the topic as having 'diverse characteristics' with 'details yet to be verified', and evidence [6] only mentions that markets 'may' fluctuate, not that they are reacting to a confirmed large-scale attack.
t2_problematic_subclaims: Conflict has entered a high-intensity stage
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post fabricates the occurrence of a specific military strike and its physical evidence (debris, satellite damage) based on unverified social media rumors, presenting speculation and general market sensitivity as confirmed facts.

images.scene_description: A night-time photograph showing a city skyline with multiple bright streaks of light (missile trails) and explosions in the sky. A digital timestamp 'MAR 01 2026 01:12' is overlaid in the top left corner.
images.v2_evidence: The image features a large digital timestamp overlay ('MAR 01 2026 01:12') and a 'REGIONAL SOURCE' watermark added to the video feed.
images.explanation: The image depicts the night sky explosions described in the text, but contains added timestamp overlays.

images.scene_description: A close-up photo of a burnt, cylindrical metal object lying on the ground. The image has been heavily edited with red arrows and white text labels pointing to specific parts of the debris.
images.ocr_text: Separation marks | Booster stage (air-launched ballistic ballistic missile) | IRAN / Mar 1, 2026 (unverified)
images.v2_evidence: The image contains explicit editorial overlays: red arrows and text labels ('Separation marks', 'Booster stage') added to identify parts of the debris.
images.explanation: The image shows the debris mentioned in the text but is clearly edited with explanatory graphics.

images.scene_description: A photo of a large, grey missile casing lying on a grassy hillside. A large semi-transparent watermark is visible across the center.
images.v2_evidence: The image has a large 'NEWS' watermark overlaid across the center of the frame.
images.explanation: The image shows the suspected debris described in the text, with a standard news watermark overlay.

images.scene_description: A composite infographic showing two satellite images of an industrial facility (Natanz) labeled 'PRE-INCIDENT' and 'POST-INCIDENT'. It includes a legend, scale bar, and text descriptions of damage.
images.ocr_text: PRE-INCIDENT: 2026-03-01 / 10:30 UTC | POST-INCIDENT: 2026-03-01 / 14:15 UTC | Rapid Satellite Assessment NATANZ AREA, IRAN (UNCONFIRMED) | Legend | Likely Impact Site | Facility Damage Zone | Craters/Scorching | Scale Bar | 0m 100m 200m | NIR REFLECTANCE (Low to High) | Pre-Incident imagery shows operational infrastructure. | Post-Incident imagery (Retasked: 14:15 UTC) reveals two major impact points and significant structural damage. | Assessment indicates likely aerial strike or explosion (Unconfirmed source). | Minor smoke plumes still visible. | Lat: 33°43'N Lon: 51°43'E
images.v2_evidence: The image is a composite graphic containing satellite photos, red outline overlays on the facility, and extensive text blocks describing the damage.
images.explanation: The image is a designed infographic used to illustrate the satellite assessment mentioned in the text.

image_analysis.global_notes: The post uses a mix of raw footage (img 1), heavily annotated evidence (img 2, 4), and composite screenshots (img 5) to build its narrative. Only the final image (img 6) is a clean, unedited photograph.

judge.level3_rationale: 该帖准确报道了2026年3月以色列空袭伊朗及引发的市场反应，核心事实成立；但文中引用的多张关键图片均包含时间戳、标注箭头或水印等后期编辑元素，属于视觉编辑，不影响核心结论但存在局部瑕疵。
judge.reasoning_trace: The post reports a real event (Israel-Iran conflict) supported by evidence. The images provided are real photos but contain editorial overlays (timestamps, arrows, watermarks), triggering V2. No fabrication (T1) or misleading context (T3) was found in the text relative to the evidence. The presence of V2 alone with a true core leads to Mostly True.
judge.core_claim: 2026年2月28日至3月1日，以色列对伊朗发动了空袭，引发了防空拦截、导弹残骸落地、核设施受损及市场避险反应。
key_subclaims: 以色列于2月28日宣布并实施了对伊朗的“先发制人打击”。
社交媒体流传的夜间火光与拦截画面证实了空袭行动。
地面发现的残骸被确认为空射弹道导弹的助推器分离段。
卫星对比图显示纳坦兹核设施在3月1日遭受了严重破坏。
冲突导致黄金、原油等避险资产价格走高及航班改道。
伊朗方面正准备进行“毁灭性报复”。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 以色列于2月28日宣布并实施了对伊朗的“先发制人打击”。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据[1]、[3]、[17]确认以色列在2026年2月28日晚宣布并实施了对伊朗的空袭，且定性为预防性打击。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 社交媒体流传的夜间火光与拦截画面证实了空袭行动。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据[3]、[1]描述了德黑兰及中部工业区出现火光与防空拦截轨迹，与图片1内容一致。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 地面发现的残骸被确认为空射弹道导弹的助推器分离段。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据[4]提到有观察者将残骸标注为助推器，但图片2明确标注为“unverified”（未证实），且证据[8]指出需避免过度引申。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 卫星对比图显示纳坦兹核设施在3月1日遭受了严重破坏。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据[2]提到纳坦兹周边出现弹坑与烟渍，但图片4标注为“UNCONFIRMED”（未确认），且证据未直接证实设施“严重破坏”的程度。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 冲突导致黄金、原油等避险资产价格走高及航班改道。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据[5]、[11]确认市场避险情绪升温，黄金原油拉升，且图片5展示了相关数据。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 伊朗方面正准备进行“毁灭性报复”。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据[14]、[15]提到伊朗强调保留回应权，但“毁灭性报复”更多是社交媒体情绪化表达（证据[7]），官方措辞较为克制。

judge.verdict_reasoning: 核心事件（以色列空袭伊朗、市场反应）在证据中得到支持，属于真实报道。然而，文中引用的关键视觉证据（图片1-5）均包含明显的后期编辑痕迹（时间戳、标注箭头、水印、合成图表），符合V2 Visual Editing的定义。由于核心事实成立，且视觉编辑属于常见的新闻呈现方式而非捏造事实（V1），且未出现T1/T3等严重误导标签，故判定为Mostly True。

image_findings.explanation: 图片包含数字时间戳叠加层（'MAR 01 2026 01:12'）和来源水印，属于视觉编辑。
图片包含明显的红色箭头和英文文本标注（'Separation marks', 'Booster stage'），属于视觉编辑。
图片中心覆盖有巨大的半透明'NEWS'水印，属于视觉编辑。
图片为合成的卫星对比图，包含红框高亮、图例和文本标签，属于视觉编辑。
图片为应用截图，包含叠加的图表弹窗，属于视觉编辑。
图片为现场废墟照片，无明显编辑痕迹。
